creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Michael,

thanks for taking up my PR. Did you notice that there is a "follow up" 
PR ports/162858 http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=162858 which 
would make 161922 obsolote?

Miwi took it and reported some error, but I have no clue what is going 
wrong there :-(

Rainer
